intro: An electric wire-rope traction hoist for man-riding and material lifting. Its α-shaped rope path lets the rope pass through the machine, so lift height is limited only by the rope you deploy.

points.title: Man-riding certified
points.line: Designed and certified to EN 1808 for lifting people, with safety devices built in.
Three models, one platform. Single or three-phase, 208 V / 60 Hz.

points.title: Integrated OSLA brake
points.line: Independent overspeed safety lock, factory-fitted. The hoist cannot run without it.
